tale_alfworld_action.description: Execute one ALFWorld action. Tool auto-starts episode on first call and auto-closes when done.

action.description: One textual action sent to environment.

env_name.description: Target env/task name. Required on first call of a task.

task_index.description: Task index fallback when env_name omitted.

restart.description: Force start a new task and drop current active task.

tale_suite_root.description: Optional absolute path to tale-suite root.
